nasb.text: Speak now in the hearing of the people that each man ask from his neighbor and each woman from her neighbor for articles of silver and articles of gold.”

esv.text: Speak now in the hearing of the people, that they ask, every man of his neighbor and every woman of her neighbor, for silver and gold jewelry.”

cnv.text: 現在你要告訴人民，叫他們男女各人向自己的鄰舍索取銀器金器。”

ccb.text: 你要告诉以色列人，不论男女，去向邻近的埃及人索取金器银器。”
